subject: fix(timer-leaks): apply pattern-audit findings
body:
`pattern-audit` found two real timer-leak violations vs
glow-props/TIMER_LEAKS.md and one z-index scale deviation:

- AIPromptHelper.handleCopy: setTimeout had no cleanup path. If user
  copied and immediately navigated away (tab switch / sheet close)
  the 2s reset fired against an unmounted component, leaking a
  setCopied call. Store id on useRef; clear on unmount and on every
  new copy. Per TIMER_LEAKS.md §2 (single-shot, handler-driven).

- usePWAInstall effect: two parallel timeouts cleared via separate
  raw vars. Converted to array-drain shape so additional timers can
  be added without rewriting cleanup. Per TIMER_LEAKS.md §1.

- FreeformEditor three refs (confirm/blur/scroll): reviewed — the
  subagent flagged these but they're independent single-shot timers
  driven by different event handlers, already correctly using §2's
  useRef-per-timer shape. No change.

- Z_INDEX_SCALE.md deviations documented in CLAUDE.md: native
  <dialog> modals render above debug pill (accepted for native focus
  trap + Escape handling), and MobileNav at z-40 rather than z-20
  (stable; menu backdrop covers it, which is the desired behavior
  when burger menu opens).

Tags: timer-leaks, pwa, freeform, claude-md, pattern-audit, fleet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: apply pattern-audit findings
